source_declaration.declaration_line: theorem choose_natCast [NatPowAssoc R] (n k : ℕ) : choose (n : R) k = Nat.choose n k := by
source_declaration.name: Ring.choose_natCast
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem choose_natCast [NatPowAssoc R] (n k : ℕ) : choose (n : R) k = Nat.choose n k := by
  rw [← nsmul_right_inj (Nat.factorial_ne_zero k),
    ← descPochhammer_eq_factorial_smul_choose, nsmul_eq_mul, ← Nat.cast_mul,
    ← Nat.descFactorial_eq_factorial_mul_choose, ← descPochhammer_smeval_eq_descFactorial]

@[simp]

hydrated_mathlib_context.why_needed: connects Ring.choose to standard binomial coefficients

messages.data: Nat.choose : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ

source_declaration.name: Nat.choose
source_declaration.source_snippet:
def choose : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ
  | _, 0 => 1
  | 0, _ + 1 => 0
  | n + 1, k + 1 => choose n k + choose n (k + 1)

source_declaration.name: Finset.sum_pow
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem sum_pow (x : α → R) (n : ℕ) :
    s.sum x ^ n = ∑ k ∈ s.sym n, k.val.multinomial * (k.val.map x).prod := by
  conv_rhs => rw [← sum_coe_sort]
  convert sum_pow_of_commute x s (fun _ _ _ _ _ ↦ Commute.all ..) n
  rw [Multiset.noncommProd_eq_prod]

end CommSemiring
end Finset

source_declaration.name: Finset.sym
source_declaration.source_snippet:
protected def sym (s : Finset α) : ∀ n, Finset (Sym α n)
  | 0 => {∅}
  | n + 1 => s.sup fun a ↦ Finset.image (Sym.cons a) (s.sym n)

source_declaration.name: Fintype.piFinset
source_declaration.source_snippet:
def piFinset (t : ∀ a, Finset (δ a)) : Finset (∀ a, δ a) :=
  (Finset.univ.pi t).map ⟨fun f a => f a (mem_univ a), fun _ _ =>
    by simp +contextual [funext_iff]⟩

source_declaration.declaration_line: def esymm (n : ℕ) : MvPolynomial σ R :=
source_declaration.name: MvPolynomial.esymm
source_declaration.source_snippet:
def esymm (n : ℕ) : MvPolynomial σ R :=
  ∑ t ∈ powersetCard n univ, ∏ i ∈ t, X i

/--
`esymmPart` is the product of the symmetric polynomials `esymm μᵢ`,
where `μ = (μ₁, μ₂, ...)` is a partition.
-/

source_declaration.name: MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_sum_subtype
source_declaration.source_snippet:
/-- We can define `esymm σ R n` by summing over a subtype instead of over `powerset_len`. -/
theorem esymm_eq_sum_subtype (n : ℕ) :
    esymm σ R n = ∑ t : {s : Finset σ // #s = n}, ∏ i ∈ (t : Finset σ), X i :=
  sum_subtype _ (fun _ => mem_powersetCard_univ) _

/-- We can define `esymm σ R n` as a sum over explicit monomials -/

hydrated_mathlib_context.why_needed: explicit formula for elementary symmetric function
